ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) of the security */,
  "mnemonic" TEXT /* Mnemonic or ticker symbol of the security */,
  "security_desc" TEXT /* Description of the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., Common stock, Preferred stock) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "security_id_external" INTEGER /* External security identifier */,
  "listed_exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the security belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the security belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_security_type FOREIGN KEY ("security_type") REFERENCES security_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading day */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "holiday_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the day is a holiday */,
  "market_open" TEXT /* Market open time */,
  "market_close" TEXT /* Market close time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading day */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., Pre-market, Regular, After-hours) */,
  "trading_phase" TEXT /* Trading phase (e.g., Opening, Closing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading activity */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading day */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading session */,
  "start_price" REAL /* Starting price of the security */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the security */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the security */,
  "end_price" REAL /* Ending price of the security */,
  "traded_volume" INTEGER /* Total traded volume of the security */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades for the security */,
  "average_trade_size" REAL /* Average size of each trade */,
  "total_trade_value" REAL /* Total value of all trades */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activities_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activities_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES trading_days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activities_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country that uses the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the security type (e.g., Common stock, Preferred stock) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the security type (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading activity being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the activity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the activity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES trading_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading activity */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES trading_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)
